3608.name: Southern End of the Cavern
3608.description: You creep along the southern edge of a large cavern. Echoing throughout the area is the thundering rush of falling water. Carcasses and bones lay in haphazard piles along the floor. A small opening passes to the west, into a narrow cave.

3609.name: Centre of the Cavern
3609.description: You stand within the centre of a large darkened cavern. In the gloom you sense several hulking forms lurking, watching. Gnawed bones and the torn remains of bodies rot upon the floor of the cavern. Bats obsessively fly in and out of a large opening to the east from which the sound of rushing water can be heard.

3610.name: Northern End of the Cavern
3610.description: A collection of branches, foliage and strips of bloodied cloth are piled here to form a dank, reeking nest in an alcove at the northern side of the cavern. Large claw-marks marr the rough stone floor, upon which a trail of blood leads away from a sordid mess of recent kills. The sound of rushing water echoes softly here.

npcs.name: Large wyvern
npcs.description: forked tongue flicks outward as she begins to softly hiss, her gaze never straying from your small form, her girth never moving away from the nest.
